title: On Reading The Life Of Haroun Er Reshid
content:
Down all the lanterned Bagdad of our youth
    He steals, with golden justice for the poor:
    Within his palace you shall know the truth!
    A blood-smeared headsman hides behind each door.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Madison Julius Cawein delivers a powerful performance in "On Reading The Life Of Haroun Er Reshid"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
